description: Style Note Accesorise your outfit with fabulous costume jewellery from adrika. It will grab attention with its subtle beauty and exquisite designs. Wear it for that special day and get the mood just right with this piece! Product Details Brown beaded, thirteen strands necklace that culminates at a metal embellishment with a lobster clasp Material and Care Glass beads with uncut agate stone and brass beads Wipe with soft cloth to maintain shine and keep away dust and dirt Size Length of chain: 21 cm
